# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

Pythinker (formerly AI Manus) is a general-purpose AI Agent system that runs tools in isolated Docker sandbox environments. The system consists of three sub-projects: frontend (Vue 3), backend (FastAPI), and sandbox (Docker-based execution environment).

## Development Commands

### Start Development Environment (Docker Compose)
```bash
./dev.sh up              # Start all services with hot-reload
./dev.sh down -v         # Stop and clean up volumes
./dev.sh build           # Rebuild images after dependency changes
```

Development ports:
- 5173: Frontend (Vite)
- 8000: Backend API
- 8080: Sandbox API
- 5902: Sandbox VNC
- 27017: MongoDB

### Backend Development
```bash
cd backend
uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
```

### Frontend Development
```bash
cd frontend
npm install
npm run dev              # Start dev server
npm run build            # Build for production
npm run type-check       # TypeScript validation
```

### Running Tests
```bash
# Backend tests (from backend/ directory)
pytest                   # Run all tests
pytest tests/test_auth_routes.py  # Single test file
pytest -k test_name      # Run specific test by name
```

## Architecture

### Backend (Domain-Driven Design)
```
backend/app/
├── domain/              # Core business logic
│   ├── models/          # Domain entities
│   ├── services/        # Domain services, agents, tools
│   │   ├── agents/      # PlanAct agent implementation
│   │   ├── tools/       # Browser, File, Shell, Search, MCP tools
│   │   └── prompts/     # System prompt templates
│   └── external/        # External service interfaces
├── application/         # Business orchestration
│   └── services/        # Auth, Agent, File, Token services
├── interfaces/          # API layer
│   └── api/routes.py    # FastAPI endpoints
└── infrastructure/      # Technical implementations
    ├── external/        # LLM, Search, Sandbox adapters
    ├── storage/         # MongoDB, Redis clients
    └── repositories/    # Data access
```

### Frontend (Vue 3 + TypeScript)
```
frontend/src/
├── pages/               # Route pages (Chat, Home, Login, Share)
├── components/          # UI components, file previews
├── composables/         # Reusable state (useAuth, useTool, etc.)
├── locales/             # i18n translations
└── utils/               # Utilities (auth, eventBus)
```

### System Flow
1. Web sends session creation request to Backend
2. Backend creates isolated Docker Sandbox via `/var/run/docker.sock`
3. User messages flow through PlanAct Agent which orchestrates tools
4. Events stream back to Web via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
5. Browser visualization uses VNC → websockify → NoVNC

## Key Dependencies

**Backend**: FastAPI, Beanie (MongoDB ODM), Redis, Playwright, MCP protocol, OpenAI SDK
**Frontend**: Vue 3, Vite, TailwindCSS, Monaco Editor, NoVNC

## Environment Configuration

Copy `.env.example` to `.env` and configure:
- `API_KEY`, `API_BASE`, `MODEL_NAME`: LLM provider settings
- `AUTH_PROVIDER`: `password`, `none`, or `local`
- `SANDBOX_NETWORK`: Must match docker-compose network name (`pythinker-network`)

## MCP Tool Integration

External MCP servers can be configured in `/etc/mcp.json` (or `MCP_CONFIG_PATH`). See `mcp.json.example` for format. Supports `stdio`, `sse`, and `streamable-http` transports.
